task.title: Default the web app to dark mode unless a saved override exists

events.content: Changed the theme model so the app always starts in dark mode unless local storage explicitly requests light: Changed the theme model so the app always starts in dark mode unless local storage explicitly requests light

raw.question: Changed the theme model so the app always starts in dark mode unless local storage explicitly requests light
raw.chosen: Changed the theme model so the app always starts in dark mode unless local storage explicitly requests light
raw.reasoning: This removes the remaining system-theme behavior and makes the default deterministic on both the server render and the client bootstrap.

retrospective.summary: Made dark mode the unconditional default by server-rendering data-theme=dark and keeping light as an explicit saved override.
